subject: [PATCH v6 06/15] mm: add MM_CP_UFFD_RWP change_protection() flag

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch adds two new flags to the change_protection() function: MM_CP_UFFD_RWP and MM_CP_UFFD_RWP_RESOLVE. The first flag installs a PAGE_NONE PTE with the uffd bit set, making it distinguishable from other faults. The second flag restores the original vma->vm_page_prot and clears the uffd bit. These flags are used by userfaultfd RWP to protect pages from being accessed, and they share the same PTE bit as MM_CP_UFFD_WP. The patch updates several kernel files, including mm/huge_memory.c, mm/hugetlb.c, and mm/mprotect.c, to support these new flags.
